title: Foo
description: Strict required/default matrix fixture. One field per row (and a few extra payload shapes) so every cell of the matrix gets exercised at least once.

opt_str_with_default.title: Optional, non-nullable, literal string default (row 3, string)

opt_int_with_default.title: Optional, non-nullable, literal int default (row 3, int)

opt_bool_with_default.title: Optional, non-nullable, literal bool default (row 3, bool)

opt_nullable_str_literal_default.title: Optional, nullable, literal string default (row 5, string)
